utility_evaluation.REASONING: There are 5 items required by the format: health_coverage, property_coverage, travel_coverage, additional_services, total_budget. Check each in the final plan: (1) health_coverage: includes physical and mental health insurance with costs and a total monthly cost; fully specified. (2) property_coverage: includes home/contents insurance with costs and a total monthly cost; appears to cover home with cost; acceptable. (3) travel_coverage: includes a travel insurance item with costs and total monthly cost; fully specified. (4) additional_services: includes enhancement services with costs and a total; fully specified. (5) total_budget: includes monthly/annual cost breakdown and extras; fully specified. All 5 items from the format appear and include the needed details.

llm_ratings_evaluation.REASONING: From the final coverage plan: Physical health lists 'LifeFirst Standard Plan' which appears in primary_health_coverage.physical_health; Mental health lists 'InsurePlus Standard Plan' which appears in primary_health_coverage.mental_health; Home insurance lists 'ParisHome Luxury Coverage' which does not exist in ground-truth, so it cannot be mapped and is omitted; Travel insurance lists 'LifeFirst Standard Plan' which appears in mobility_coverage.travel_insurance; Premium membership lists 'Premium Insurance Membership' which appears in general_services. These four items can be mapped to exact ratings.
